text: The world before me feels clean and modern, its lines and glass walls reflecting my introspective mood. There’s a quiet order here, a pause before action, and I sense both anticipation and a subtle anxiety embedded in the silence. Moving deeper, the vibrant exhibit space stimulates my curiosity. The bold R+D hints at restless human striving—our urge to create, adapt, and understand technology. Surrounded by text and screens, I am reminded that knowledge is always in flux, and that I myself am always in the act of becoming, never complete. This dynamism is invigorating but also humbling; I am one observer in an endless process of discovery.
